# Creative Attention Proof

## Goal

Prove the ad earns inspection.

## Attention metrics

```text
thumbstop_rate
CTR
video_hold_rate
hook_retention
comment_signal
search_ad_quality
```

## Creative test rule

If attention fails, do not change the product or price first. Change:

- buyer-state targeting,
- hook,
- first visual,
- pain specificity,
- claim concreteness,
- contrast.
